scripts.dev: npm run check-node && set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH%" && nodemon server.js
scripts.migrate:lessons:ejs: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH%" && node scripts/migrate-lessons-to-ejs.js mst24 it114 node java dsalgo mini
scripts.lint: eslint app routes utils middleware scripts server.js supabaseClient.js
scripts.lint:strict: eslint --max-warnings=0 app routes utils middleware scripts server.js supabaseClient.js
scripts.format: prettier --write app/registerRoutes.js middleware/apiSecurity.js routes/authWebRoutes.js routes/passwordResetRoutes.js routes/accountApiRoutes.js routes/adminUsersRoutes.js routes/auditTrailApi.js routes/paymentsReportsApi.js routes/paymentAuditsApi.js routes/crfvSettingsApi.js routes/reportsApi.js routes/attendanceApi.js routes/crfvPagesRoutes.js supabaseClient.js utils/requestParsers.js utils/paymentInfoStore.js utils/attendanceSheetsRelay.js public/crfv/js/api-client.js public/crfv/js/reports.js public/crfv/js/attendance.js public/crfv/js/payment-reports.js public/crfv/js/system-settings.js public/crfv/js/account-management.js tests/smoke/accountApiRoutes.test.js tests/smoke/adminUsersRoutes.test.js tests/smoke/auditTrailApi.test.js tests/smoke/attendanceApi.test.js tests/smoke/reportsApi.test.js tests/smoke/paymentsReportsApi.test.js tests/smoke/crfvAttendanceSettingsApi.test.js tests/smoke/crfvRouteAccess.test.js docs/route-map.md docs/route-security-matrix.md
